text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant... Whew!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Just thirty more addresses to go! If I can get all
these flyers delivered before sunrise...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'll hit a new personal record!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series—every Umamusume dreams of
competing in it someday.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's an intense, hair-raising series of clashes where
racers hurtle with all their might toward the finish
line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some strive for glory, while others simply wish to
realize their long-held dreams. But all of them
have their eyes trained in on the victor's throne.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, one more runner is about to put
everything on the line and join the fray.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (...This is my wish—what I want for my future!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... If I can finish up my last thirty deliveries within thirty minutes...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Then I can make my debut in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Boss!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Part-Time Worker No. 7, Ines, reporting for duty!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Morning, Ines. Look at you, so lively this early in
the morning. Could you take the trash out?
Thaaanks.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ack. Boss, you sure have a unique way of treating
your employees! But don't worry, you can make it
up to me by upping my pay next month!

text_block_list.name: Convenience Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Not happening. Wait, are you sure I should put
you on the schedule next month? Didn't you get
into that thing?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yep, that's right! At long last...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I'm going to make my debut in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day Ines Fujin starts training for the
Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I check over the regimen I made last night. It
looks like we'll be fine equipment-wise. Glancing
down at my wristwatch...
choice_data_list:
...Only ten more minutes until morning practice,
huh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day Ines Fujin learned that her debut was set,
she actually came to me with a request.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I want to keep working part-time, even
after my debut!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I won't cause you any trouble! And I definitely, definitely won't let my shifts mess up my punctuality!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's an incredibly meticulous Umamusume. I
can't imagine she'd show up late for practice.
That said...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, Oguri! You were sooo cool during
your races last year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finished their warm-ups, Umamusume start
flooding onto the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The star racer, Oguri Cap, receives the brunt of
the attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her feats have greatly contributed to the
popularity of racing. And the next Umamusume
expected to take up her mantle are...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Ryan. You performed spectacularly during
those last 400 meters. I thought you had me
beaten for sure this time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Right back at you, McQueen! The way you refuse
to back off an inch until the race's over makes
you a real tough opponent!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their names are Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro
Ryan. They're both contenders from the Mejiro
family, and also happen to be peers of Ines
Fujin's.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even ahead of their debuts, these two are already
firmly in the spotlight. If they're going to become
our future rivals, then we can't afford to waste a
single second of training.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heya-hey, Trainer! See? I'm right on time! Ready
when you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's training includes a strength-building
workout and two ramp runs. For a pre-debut
Umamusume, it's pretty strenuous.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's not just those two Umamusume from the
Mejiro family she'll have to contend with—she's
also a late transfer who only joined Tracen from
the senior division.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Truthfully, she's lacking in both muscle strength
and racing instincts—two factors crucial to her
success. And that's exactly why...
choice_data_list: It's time to knuckle down! Hard!
It's time to knuckle down! Hard!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin manages to make it through the
regimen I prepared.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Phew! Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I mean, when I get the chance to run... it
only makes sense to go full throttle, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's been my dream to race since I was a kid, and
now that world's within reach.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I've never been this happy in my life!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Agh, that's my phone! Sorry, just... give me a sec!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hello? Oh, Cassie! Polly!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Have your presents arrived?
Oh, great! How are your new shoes?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Well, that's what happens when you work
hard! Don't forget, your big sis is cheering you on
every single day!
Okay, yep. Keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that was Cassie and Polly. Geez, they
didn't have to call me just to say thanks.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you guys haven't met? Cassie and Polly are
my little sisters. They're twins!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
They both take dance lessons, and they're so
good they got praised by their teacher!
Apparently, they're synchronized little maestros!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Basically, I used my part-time work money to buy
them both some shoes.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I mean, their old ones were pretty worn-out and
close to falling apart.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And you know, when I said I wanted to run, my
family got behind me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So if my sisters have dreams of their own, I want
to be there to help too!
choice_data_list: So that's why you want to keep working.
So that's why you want to keep working.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.
choice_data_list:
Even if it puts you at a disadvantage
schedule-wise?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...I know it sounds naive. It's a lot to work
part-time while competing. And I do need the
practice—more than any other runner.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I get it. I really do. But...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Aha, I wasn't expecting that. Don't you want to
give it a bit more time before you give me your
answer?
choice_data_list: If it matters to you, it matters to me, too.
If it matters to you, it matters to me, too.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Ooh, really? So you'd be willing to support me in anything?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, you can't take that promise
back, okay? Hehe. ♪ Hmm, I wonder what else I
could say matters to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Hastily-made promises aside, this leaves me
with a lot to think about when it comes to Ines's
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ponder the best way to help her achieve the
growth she needs. If we're going to make the most
of the limited time we have, I'd better completely
revise our regimen.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Morning, Trainer! Another day, another session—

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what happened to you?! Your dark circles
have dark circles!
choice_data_list: I was working on our training schedule...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One long night of writing later, I have a revamped
regimen ready to show her.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Right, let's see what's what. First up is stretches, a
jog, and ladder drills. After that we've got weight
lifting, stair climbing, and race-start practice, and
then we get out the mini hurdles...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...I'm pretty confident about my stamina, but this
is way too much for me to do in a single day.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Pffft, haha. You know, after what you said
yesterday, I thought you were a bit more on top
of things.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But still, I appreciate the sheer amount of time
you put into this! You get an A for effort!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So, what should we start off with? We can't get
through it all, but let's do as much as we can!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Knowing you, Trainer, everything on that regimen
is worth doing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Ines Fujin taking on my overstuffed schedule
to the best of her ability, our training journey
begins!
